Notes: Pin the A RRset at m.campus.edu. with rrset_equals, then issue delete_name for the same owner in the same UPDATE. Follow with queries for A and MX to observe whether sibling RRsets survive, the entire name is wiped, or the server rejects the composition.

Steps.Description: Assert the current A RRset at m.campus.edu., then delete the entire name in the same UPDATE.

Steps.Name: m.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset remains, is removed, or the name is gone.

Steps.Name: m.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the sibling MX RRset survives the delete_name operation.
